projectDescription: A collection of 39 training pipelines for fine-tuning large language models using Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), GRPO, and Preference Alignment across math reasoning, multi-hop QA, medical QA, and general QA domains.
keyFeatures: 39 training pipelines across SFT, GRPO, and Preference Alignment
5 adapter methods: LoRA, QLoRA, DoRA, P-Tuning, Prefix-Tuning
GRPO with LLM-as-a-Judge reward functions via DeepEval and Evidently AI
Preference alignment with DPO, ORPO, KTO, and PPO
Two-stage SFT + GRPO math reasoning pipeline
16 datasets spanning math, multi-hop QA, medical QA, and general QA
Powered by HuggingFace TRL, PEFT, and Unsloth
Configurable hyperparameters via YAML config files
publicApiSurface: DatasetConfig(dataset_id, subset, cache_dir, remove_source_columns, num_proc, extra_load_kwargs)
